basic_details.job_title: ECHS Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline for 20 Medical Officer, Gynaecologist and More Posts
basic_details.post_name: Medical Officer, Gynaecologist and More Posts
basic_details.short_information: Ex Servicemen Contributory Health Scheme (ECHS) Medical Officer, Gynaecologist and More Posts Notification 2026 has been released on the official website echs.gov.in. A total of 20 vacancies have been announced through the ECHS Medical Officer, Gynaecologist and More Posts Recruitment 2026.

qualification.details: Officer-in-Charge (OIC): Graduate. Retired defence officers and drawing pension from defence estimates. 05 years in Health Care institutions or Managerial Positions. Medical Specialist: MS/MS in Speciality concerned/ DNB. Registration with national/ State council. 03 yrs. in the specialist after Post Graduation. Gynaecologist: MS/MS in Speciality concerned/ DNB. Registration with national/ State council. 03 yrs. in the specialist after Post Graduation. Medical Officer: MBBS. Registration with national/ State council. 3 yrs. in Medicine/ Surgery. Dental Officer: BDS. Registration with national/ State council. 03 yrs.

salary_details.details: Officer-in-Charge (OIC): Rs 95,000/- Medical Specialist: Rs 1,30,000/- Gynaecologist: Rs 1,30,000/- Medical Officer: Rs 95,000/- Dental Officer: Rs 95,000/-

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for ECHS Various Posts Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: www.echs.gov.in.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 04-08-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

rows.ex_servicemen_contributory_health_scheme: Medical Officer, Gynaecologist and More Posts

content_sections.heading: ECHS Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates should download and read the ECHS Jobs 2026 notification PDF carefully to check vacancy details, eligibility, age limit, and application instructions. The notification also includes important dates and selection process details. The direct download link is available in the Important Links section below. Download ECHS Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: Officer-in-Charge (OIC): Graduate. Retired defence officers and drawing pension from defence estimates. 05 years in Health Care institutions or Managerial Positions. Medical Specialist: MS/MS in Speciality concerned/ DNB. Registration with national/ State council. 03 yrs. in the specialist after Post Graduation. Gynaecologist: MS/MS in Speciality concerned/ DNB. Registration with national/ State council. 03 yrs. in the specialist after Post Graduation. Medical Officer: MBBS. Registration with national/ State council. 3 yrs. in Medicine/ Surgery. Dental Officer: BDS. Registration with national/ State council. 03 yrs.

content_sections.heading: Salary / Stipend
content_sections.text: Officer-in-Charge (OIC): Rs 95,000/- Medical Specialist: Rs 1,30,000/- Gynaecologist: Rs 1,30,000/- Medical Officer: Rs 95,000/- Dental Officer: Rs 95,000/-

rows.event: Last Date of receipt of application

content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to apply for ECHS Various Posts Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before applying. Download the application form from the official website: www.echs.gov.in. Fill the application form carefully with correct information. Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates. Check all details carefully before submission. Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed. Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 04-08-2026. Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the organization name for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The recruitment is being conducted by the Ex Servicemen Contributory Health Scheme (ECHS).

faq.question: Q2. What is the name of the post for which ECHS is recruiting?
faq.answer: ECHS is recruiting for Medical and Para Medical Staff positions.

faq.question: Q3. How many total vacancies are available in this ECHS recruitment?
faq.answer: There are a total of 20 vacancies for Medical and Para Medical Staff posts.

faq.question: Q4. What is the mode of application for ECHS Medical and Para Medical Staff posts?
faq.answer: The application mode for these posts is offline. Candidates need to download and submit the form.

faq.question: Q5. What is the last date to apply for ECHS Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date for receipt of the offline application is 04 August 2026.

faq.question: Q6. What are the main qualifications required for these posts?
faq.answer: Candidates generally need to have a Graduate, MS/MS/DNB, MBBS, or BDS qualification, depending on the specific post.

faq.question: Q7. Is there any application fee for ECHS Medical and Para Medical Staff Recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) in this recruitment.

faq.question: Q8. What is the job type for the ECHS Medical and Para Medical Staff positions?
faq.answer: The job type for these positions is Contractual, as specified in the official notification.

faq.question: Q9. What is the selection process for ECHS Medical and Para Medical Staff?
faq.answer: The selection process for these posts includes an Interview followed by Document Verification.

faq.question: Q10. What is the job location for these ECHS vacancies?
faq.answer: The job location for these vacancies is Alwar, Rajasthan, with pincode 301023.
